title: Alphabet Q1 2026 Earnings: Cloud and AI Drive Performance
text: Alphabet Q1 2026: net income $62.58 billion ($5.11 per share), up 81% YoY. Revenue $109.9 billion (vs $107.2B expected), growing 20% marking highest quarterly growth since 2022. Enterprise AI solutions became primary growth driver for cloud for first time Q1. Google Cloud revenue beat at $20.03 billion (vs $18.05B estimated), 63% increase YoY. Google Cloud backlog nearly doubled to $460 billion+. Company updated 2026 capex guidance to $180-190 billion (up from $175-185B). CFO expects 2027 capex to significantly increase vs 2026. Search quarter strong with AI experiences driving usage, queries at all-time high with 19% revenue growth. Strongest quarter for consumer AI plans driven by Gemini app adoption, subscriptions reaching 350 million.
